steps.title: Find the defining contrast
steps.content: The notes reveal two specific structural differences: first-class levers place the fulcrum between effort and load, while second-class levers place the load between effort and fulcrum. A contrast requires showing these distinct positions.

steps.title: Select the answer stating both positions
steps.content: D lays out the exact positional difference: fulcrum-between in first-class, load-between in second-class. The other three either define shared properties, use vague language about differences, or actually emphasize similarity instead of contrast. That matches choice D — D is correct.
